---
format:
  aagi-pdf+report:
    fig-path: figures/pdf-report/
    keep-tex: true

execute:
  echo: false

params:
  uni: CU
  pri_bio: Your.Name
  project_num: AAA--BBB
  partner: collab_partner
  partner_email: collab_partner@email.com.au

date: last-modified
date-format: long
bibliography: references.bib

title: >-
  Analytics for the Australian Grains Industry -
  `r if (params$uni == 'CU') 'Curtin University' else if (params$uni == 'AU') 'Adelaide University' else 'University of Queensland'`
  (AAGI-`r params$uni`) Technical Report Series: 123

subtitle: >-
  Descriptive title for report —
  Report for `r params$project_num`

---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(flextable)
library(ggplot2)
library(AAGIThemes)
library(AAGIPalettes)

theme_set(theme_aagi())
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_ft_aagi)
```

# Executive summary

Example content.

# References
